title: my trading bot actually made $81 today
author: foresttrader

replies.author: foresttrader
replies.body: haha not yet. i made the bot last night and today used this trade mainly as a test. still a lot things to add before letting AI take over

comments.author: eggrally
comments.body: SIM trading or real money? How many trades to make 81

replies.author: foresttrader
replies.body:
real profit

i needed to test it but paper trading account wasn't ready. so i went with real account. just 1 option trade

comments.author: Denis_Kurilchik
comments.body: Real money or paper. that distinction matters a lot before thinking about scaling. Most strategies lose 15-30% of their backtested performance once real slippage and execution costs enter the picture. Worth running at least 60 days of live data before drawing conclusions from the daily numbers.

replies.author: foresttrader
replies.body:
real money

i needed to test the bot and paper trading acc wasn't ready, so i tested a pretty safe bet today (it was the first trade by the bot)

comments.author: StockRegard
comments.body: DM me. I'm curious about making a bot as well.

comments.author: AppleFresh1491
comments.body: How does one even start ?? Would really love to know and understand these things.

replies.author: foresttrader
replies.body: You need to know some programming and how to command AI. Im thinking to open-source this once its more stable.

replies.author: AppleFresh1491
replies.body: I'm a Software Developer new grad basically, wanted to know about the trading , strategy building , what to trade in , etc

replies.author: OJF747
replies.body: You basically have the code understanding what you need now is to 10x your education on the strategy risk management and fee structure side, once you find a strategy you then need to use the code side to parse data sets, find edge or profitability when factoring in slippage and brokerage fees if you can get past that when you can look at api allowed brokers and automation- kaggle has lots of free datasets to train on oos/iss training and then you can run other backtests as you want or need good luck
